summary: Clone Bidso SKU feature testing completed. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Clone tab in Demand Hub, 3-step wizard (Select Source → Modify BOM → Preview & Submit), SKU table with BOM item counts, Tech Ops approval workflow in RM Repository with Bidso SKU Clone tab showing pending requests with Approve/Reject actions.
critical_code_review_comments: BOM items in bom-for-clone endpoint return empty category_data for some RMs - this is because the raw_materials collection may have incomplete data for some items, but the edit_type logic still works correctly
The /api/demand-hub/my-requests endpoint is defined twice in demand_hub_routes.py (lines 164 and 858) - the second definition overrides the first, but both have the same logic so no functional issue
seed_data_creation: Created test clone request 'TEST_Clone_Request_Variant' during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Clone Bidso SKU feature fully tested. Key verifications: 1) GET /api/demand-hub/bidso-skus-for-clone returns SKUs with BOMs and bom_item_count. 2) GET /api/demand-hub/bidso-skus/{id}/bom-for-clone returns BOM items with edit_type (LOCKED, COLOUR_ONLY, COLOUR_OR_SWAP). 3) POST /api/demand-hub/bidso-clone-requests creates clone request. 4) GET /api/demand-hub/bidso-clone-requests returns list of requests. 5) GET /api/demand-hub/bidso-clone-requests/pending-count returns pending count. 6) POST /api/demand-hub/bidso-clone-requests/{id}/review approves/rejects requests. 7) GET /api/demand-hub/my-requests includes BIDSO_CLONE type. 8) GET /api/demand-hub/my-requests/summary includes bidso_clone_requests counts. 9) Frontend Clone tab shows 3-step wizard. 10) Tech Ops RM Repository shows Bidso SKU Clone tab with approval actions.
